name: PDAX
insight: Integrated USDC on World Chain (Apr 2026); partnership with Toku for stablecoin payroll for Filipino remote workers

name: Inswitch / Movantis
insight: Acquired by TransNetwork to expand US-LATAM cross-border capabilities; launched 'Pix no mundo' with Itau Unibanco for Brazil-Portugal cross-border payments

name: Ebury
insight: Secured 550M GBP funding round (Apr 2026) to accelerate global expansion; partnership with Nium covering 100+ real-time payment corridors and 220+ payout markets across APAC/LATAM/EMEA

name: Iron (MoonPay)
insight: Mastercard partnership to enable stablecoin-linked card payments using Iron API infrastructure; Select integration for virtual accounts. Acquired by MoonPay Mar 2026

name: Riyad Bank
insight: Innovation arm Jeel partnered with Ripple to test blockchain-based cross-border payments and digital asset custody in Saudi Arabia regulatory sandbox (Vision 2030 aligned)

name: Kraken
insight: Launched Payward Ramp (white-label fiat-to-crypto B2B API); integrated Ripple RLUSD stablecoin into payment platform for cross-border flows
corridor: USD/EUR/GBP - global fiat on/off ramp, multi-corridor

name: Mercado Bitcoin
insight: Partnership with Ripple to launch Ripple Payments in Brazil for treasury operations between Brazil and Portugal; co-issuer of BRL1 stablecoin alongside Foxbit, Bitso, Cainvest

name: Binance Bahrain
insight: BPay Global received Payment Service Provider license from Central Bank of Bahrain (Apr 2025); partnered with GFH Financial Group for Bahrain first bank-integrated crypto-to-fiat payments

name: Tranglo
insight: Expanded cross-border payouts to 7 African countries (Ethiopia, Kenya, Liberia, Madagascar, Mali, Senegal, Zambia); integrated Ripple ODL across all 25 payment corridors

name: Bitstamp
insight: Acquisition by Robinhood completed (Jun 2025); expanded USDC multichain support to 7 networks (Ethereum, Stellar, Solana, Optimism, Polygon, Avalanche, Arbitrum)

name: GCEX
insight: Acquired GlobalBlock (Sep 2025); partnered with OpenPayd (Oct 2025) to enhance fiat banking rails - EUR/GBP for Europe, USD/EUR/GBP for UAE

name: HashKey (Hash Blockchain Limited)
insight: Strategic partnership with Oceanus Group (Apr 2026) to modernize global trade finance via stablecoin settlement
corridor: HKD/USD, APAC institutional, global trade finance

name: Independent Reserve
insight: Acquired by IG Group (Feb 2026); planned expansion of institutional offerings across Singapore, Australia and UAE in H2 2026

name: XREX
insight: FSC regulatory approval in Taiwan (Sep 2025) for all 4 core business categories; Tether invested $18.75M to facilitate USDT-based cross-border B2B payments in emerging markets
corridor: TWD/USD, SEA/MENA emerging markets, USDT corridors

name: Clear Junction
insight: Launched multi-currency SWIFT service for remittances across LATAM, APAC and EMEA (Nov 2025); partnered with Flutterwave to enhance cross-border payments (Sep 2025)
corridor: EUR/GBP/USD - LATAM, APAC, EMEA, SWIFT multi-currency

name: Ripio
insight: Launched wARS stablecoin pegged to Argentine peso (Nov 2025); expanding focus on local currency stablecoins and tokenized bonds across LATAM

name: FOMO Pay
insight: Launched FOMO AI Soundbox supporting stablecoin payments (Mar 2026); partnered with BNY for institutional-grade cross-border payment solution (Feb 2026)

name: Mural Pay (Mural Networks)
insight: Scaling stablecoin-powered payroll and LatAm payment corridors; operates across 170+ countries; supports PIX, SPEI, ACH, SEPA rails + USDC/USDT/PYUSD; strong Colombia corridor depth

name: Transfero /
insight: Launched Transfero Payments Network (TPN) as execution layer above financial rails connecting banking networks, stablecoin infrastructure and liquidity providers; major BRZ stablecoin issuer

name: Rain (Bahrain)
insight: First crypto platform in Bahrain to integrate BenefitPay as direct payment method (May 2026); licensed in Bahrain, UAE, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar
corridor: BHD/AED/USD, MENA (Bahrain, UAE, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar)

name: Buda.com
insight: Cross-border payment routes between Chile, Colombia, Peru, Bolivia and Venezuela (beta); Circle Alliance member using USDC infrastructure

name: VertoFX (Verto)
corridor: USD/EUR/GBP to Africa (NGN/KES/GHS), B2B Africa corridors

name: Anchorpoint Financial Limited
insight: Received first HKMA stablecoin issuer licence (Apr 2026) as JV of Standard Chartered, Animoca Brands, HKT; launching HKD-backed stablecoin HKDAP in phased rollout from Q2 2026

name: BBVA Mexico
insight: Partnership with Ripple for digital asset custody (Sep 2025); member of Qivalis consortium of 11 European banks launching EUR-pegged stablecoin; cross-border business = 37% of CIB

name: Nuvei
insight: Launched direct acquiring in Mexico (Apr 2026) - now holds local acquiring licenses in 52 markets; partnership with FreedomPay to unify enterprise payments (Jan 2026); 720+ APMs globally

name: MetaComp
insight: Raised $35M (led by Alibaba) to scale StableX Network for Web2.5 cross-border stablecoin payments; expanding across Asia, Africa, Middle East and South America

name: TranSwap
insight: Cross-border payment platform covering 180+ countries; enables virtual accounts in US, UK, EU; supports 34 currencies; focused on SME/institutional cross-border settlement

name: BitOasis
insight: Acquired by CoinDCX; supports fiat (AED) deposits via wire transfer and card across UAE, KSA, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan, Algeria, Lebanon, Morocco, Tunisia
corridor: AED/SAR/USD, MENA (UAE, KSA, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan + North Africa)

name: Bancolombia
insight: Launched Wenia digital asset service via Fireblocks subsidiary; issued COPW (Colombian peso-backed stablecoin on Polygon); offers BTC, ETH, MATIC, USDC custody

name: FirstRand Bank (FNB/RMB)
insight: First South African bank to adopt Kinexys by J.P. Morgan for blockchain-based 24/7 treasury management (Mar 2026); launched Globba cross-border payment solution with Mastercard (Nov 2025)

name: Itau Unibanco
insight: Partnered with Wise Platform for instant cross-border payments and remittances from Itau Business app (2025); exploring stablecoin issuance; co-launched Pix no mundo with Inswitch for LatAm cross-border

name: Komainu MEA
insight: Received VASP licence from VARA in Dubai; first to receive licence extension for Collateral Wallet Services under VARA; expanded Komainu Connect collateral management platform with LTP integration

name: National Bank of Egypt (NBE)
insight: Connected to RippleNet via LuLu International Exchange for cross-border remittances from UAE to Egypt; involved in MIGA-backed trade finance facility

name: Progmat, Inc.
insight: Filed patent for cross-border stablecoin transfer platform integrated with Swift (Project Pax, with Datachain); collaborating with major Japanese fintechs (NetX, Netstars, JPYC) to launch regulated JPY-backed stablecoin

name: Zand Bank
insight: CBUAE approved Zand AED - UAE first regulated multi-chain AED-backed stablecoin on public blockchains; partnership with Ripple (RLUSD) and Mastercard Move for cross-border payments

name: MoneyMatch
insight: Malaysia first fintech to complete cross-border blockchain transaction via RippleNet; covers 120+ countries, 40+ currencies; expanded to Brunei, Australia, New Zealand; serving 20,000+ individuals and 3,000+ SMEs

name: Fasset Financial Services W.L.L.
insight: Raised $51M Series B to expand stablecoin-powered Own Network infrastructure; 50+ payment corridors across Asia, Africa and Middle East; focus on neobanking and cross-border payments in emerging markets

name: Novatti Group Limited
insight: Partnership with Wirex for borderless payments in Australia; AU-SEA cross-border focus; subsidiary AUDC received AFSL from ASIC; scalable across multiple geographic corridors

name: Zepto / Zai
insight: Zepto: real-time A2A PayTo infrastructure in Australia, published PayTo Index (2026); Zai: API-driven payment orchestration, partnership with TerraPay for cross-border; new Group CEO appointed
corridor: AUD, Australia domestic + cross-border via TerraPay

name: BVNK Singapore
insight: Applied for MAS Major Payment Institution (MPI) licence in Singapore; Mastercard announced acquisition for up to $1.8B (Mar 2026); expanding APAC headquarters
corridor: USD/EUR/SGD, global stablecoin settlement, APAC hub

name: Hex Trust
insight: Received Major Payment Institution licence from MAS (Mar 2025) authorising cross-border money transfer and Digital Payment Token services; partnered with IDA for institutional-grade stablecoin custody

name: UBA Plc (United Bank for Africa)
insight: LEO chatbot became Africa first AI chatbot to enable cross-border payments via PAPSS (Pan-African Payment and Settlement System); Onafriq prepaid card partnership for cross-border

name: Let sBit
insight: Launched corporate platform for Argentine SMEs with CVU and international payment service (LB Finanzas); recently launched Pagos Internacionales service covering China and global corridors

name: Bank ABC (Arab Banking Corporation)
insight: First Middle East bank to go live with J.P. Morgan Kinexys blockchain for instant cross-border payments for corporates and FIs - specifically Bahrain-US corridor; CBB co-participant

name: AltCoinTrader Pty Ltd
insight: First South African crypto exchange to secure a Nedbank account; shifted to SWIFT/Forex for CMA country payments following regulatory changes
corridor: ZAR/USD, South Africa, CMA (Lesotho, Namibia, Eswatini)

name: Monoova
insight: Launched end-to-end FX Hub for collect-convert-settle with same-day global payments (Dec 2025); first to execute real-world cross-border settlement using AUD CBDC pilot

name: MAX Exchange (MaiCoin Group)
insight: Taiwan leading crypto exchange; strategic partnership with Bitget for MAX token international debut; focused on TWD/crypto fiat-to-crypto compliance and custody

name: Tokocrypto
insight: Key participant in newly launched Indonesia Crypto Exchange (ICEx) (Apr 2026); 5 million registered users; regulated by OJK as licensed digital asset trading provider

name: Fuze
insight: Stablecoin cross-border payments infrastructure across 65+ countries (May 2026); partnership with Miden to develop privacy-focused blockchain for regulated finance (Mar 2026)

name: Aquanow
insight: Won Best Corporate Solution of the Year at MENA FinTech Awards (Abu Dhabi Finance Week 2025); Visa partnership for stablecoin settlement in CEMEA region

name: CoinMENA
insight: First and only MENA platform to offer Ripple RLUSD stablecoin; acquired by Turkish exchange Paribu for up to $240M (Dec 2025)
corridor: BHD/SAR/AED/USD, MENA (Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait)
